intent_policy: This task is for benchmark input construction, not for retrieval.
Output only the author-facing writing intent.
Keep the output schema minimal; do not add seed entities, retrieval needs, query plans, or answer hints as separate fields.
Keep natural author-facing anchors such as central character names, main location, key vehicle or facility, mission target, or immediate setup when they are important to the writing intent.
Do not over-abstract named characters or core props into anonymous roles when the scene clearly depends on them.
Avoid full synopsis, beat lists, exact dialogue, evidence spans, and overly specific choreography.
Avoid retrieval instructions such as what to retrieve, query, recall, look up, or rank.
The output must be parseable JSON.
